record.field: Hi {{ object.name }}, hope you are doing well.
Hi {{ object.partner_id.name }}, your order {{ object.name }} for a total of {{ object.amount_total }} {{ object.currency_id.name }} has been confirmed. Thank you!
Hi {{ object.partner_id.name }}, this is a friendly reminder that invoice {{ object.name }} of {{ object.amount_total }} {{ object.currency_id.name }} is due on {{ object.invoice_date_due }}.
